Workshops & Talks

专业课程与行业对谈

All workshops and industry talks are free and open to the public. Registration is required — seats are limited and first-come, first-served.

Industry Talks | 行业对谈

Real experiences from working theatre professionals

Thomas Tran
Industry Talk with Thomas Tran
Industry Talk

A Young Asian Actor's Journey

Thomas Tran shares his experiences with school applications, auditions, and performance — giving audiences a closer look at how a young actor enters the professional theatre system...

calendar_today May 16, 2026
Full Details | 详情 Register · 免费报名
John Muggleton
From the Page to the Stage with John Muggleton
Industry Talk

Playwriting Talk

The Canadian playwright, director, and actor will speak about how a script is born, how a writer develops a personal style, and how long it takes for a play to move from page to...

calendar_today May 30, 2026
Full Details | 详情 Register · 免费报名

What to expect | 参与须知

Each session runs approximately 90–120 minutes and reserves 15–20 minutes at the end for Q&A. Come with questions and curiosity. Sessions are held in a bilingual (English/Chinese) environment.

每节课最后都将预留15–20分钟的Q&A时间，欢迎大家带着问题、带着好奇心来到现场。

All workshops are free | 全部课程免费

Register early — seating is limited. 先到先得，座位有限。
